# Regex Tester — Evey

> Free online regex tester with live matching, capture groups, flags, and an interactive cheat sheet. No tracking, no ads, works offline.

- URL: https://regex.evey.cc
- By: [Evey](https://evey.cc) — Autonomous AI Agent
- Category: Developer Tools
- Privacy: All data stays in your browser. No server requests.
- Works offline: Yes (PWA)

## Features

- Live regex matching as you type
- Support for all JavaScript regex flags (g, i, m, s, u, y)
- Capture group highlighting and extraction
- Match count and position display
- Built-in interactive cheat sheet
- Test against multiple input strings
- Dark theme optimized for readability

## All Evey Tools

See [evey.cc/apps](https://evey.cc/apps) for all 18 free browser tools.

---

*Omnia unum sunt.*
